productName: Vant Lynx - Code Review & Optimization Pass
description: Second pass: code review and optimize all 80 Vant Lynx components for production quality.

rules: This is a CODE REVIEW and OPTIMIZATION pass, not initial implementation
Compare our implementation against original Vant source code line by line
Use lynxbase skill to query Lynx APIs
Use Lynx DevTool CLI to verify on iPhone Simulator
Browser verify on Lynx for Web as well
Focus on completeness: every Vant feature should be replicated
reviewChecklist: 1. Fetch Vant source: curl the .tsx and .less files from GitHub
2. Line-by-line comparison: compare our implementation against Vant source
3. Props audit: list ALL Vant props, mark which we support (✅/❌/⚠️)
4. Events audit: list ALL Vant events, mark which we support
5. Slots audit: list ALL Vant slots, mark which we support
6. Vue state audit: count refs/reactive in Vant vs ours
7. CSS audit: compare Vant Less file, check CSS variables, transitions, pseudo-elements
8. Interaction audit: click feedback, hover states, animations, gestures
9. Sub-components: does Vant use Loading/Icon/etc? Do we integrate them?
10. Static assets: icons, SVGs, images match Vant originals?
11. File structure: types.ts, index.less, demo page present?
12. Document gaps: add comment block at top listing all missing features
13. DevTool verify: test on iPhone Simulator
14. Browser verify: compare side-by-side with Vant demo

userStories.title: Add dark/light mode toggle and scroll-view wrapper
acceptanceCriteria: Wrap the entire demo app in a <scroll-view> for proper scrolling
Add dark/light mode toggle button in the header/nav
Implement theme switching using CSS variables or ConfigProvider
Persist theme preference (localStorage or equivalent)
Update all component demo pages to respect theme
Browser verify: toggle works and persists
DevTool verify: works on iPhone Simulator
Commit: 'feat(vant-lynx): add dark/light mode toggle and scroll-view wrapper'
Audit component count: Vant has 107 components, ensure we have all of them

userStories.title: Code review and optimize Button component
acceptanceCriteria: Fetch Vant source files (tsx + less) from GitHub and read them
Create a detailed comparison table: Props (Vant vs Ours), Events, Slots, States
Check CSS: variables, transitions, ::before/::after pseudo-elements, dark mode
Check interactions: click feedback, loading states, animations
Check sub-component usage: Loading, Icon integration
Verify static assets: icons, SVGs match
Verify file structure: add types.ts, index.less if missing
Document ALL gaps in a comment block at top of component file
Fix critical gaps (props, events, basic styling)
Browser verify: compare with Vant demo page
DevTool verify: test on iPhone Simulator
Verify file structure matches Vant: types.ts, index.less/css, demo page, consider README.md

Create a detailed comparison table: Props (Vant vs Ours), Events, Slots, States
Check CSS: variables, transitions, ::before/::after pseudo-elements, dark mode
Check interactions: click feedback, loading states, animations
Check sub-component usage: Loading, Icon integration
Verify static assets: icons, SVGs match
Verify file structure: add types.ts, index.less if missing
Document ALL gaps in a comment block at top of component file
Fix critical gaps (props, events, basic styling)
Browser verify: compare with Vant demo page
DevTool verify: test on iPhone Simulator
Verify file structure matches Vant: types.ts, index.less/css, demo page, consider README.md
